title: Autonomous Council Dispatch and Model Relay
goal: Remove the founder from routine prompt transport between AI systems.
exit: A PERT-ready task is auto-routed to >=2 real model adapters; responses captured, validated, aggregated, reflected into PERT state without manual copying.
binding_rule: state moves to COMPLETED only when >=2 distinct adapters independently satisfy the task evidence contract; otherwise PARTIAL/BLOCKED/UNKNOWN. A string literal can never set this.
